title: Create: pneumatic equipment
description: Adds air tools and related blocks
body:
**NOTE!**
The mod is in beta because it has not been tested well and not all functions have been completed. If any errors are found, I recommend reporting them.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876e755744574bf21f96d8da3f8714db331d8a3b.png)

**What is this mod about?**
This is a small addon to the Create mod and it adds pneumatic tools and other things that work with the backtanks from the Create mod.


**What does this mod add?**

**-Pneumatic Pickaxe & Pneumatic Axe**
Both of these tools operate using air from the backtank. One advantage of these tools is that when worn out, you only lose the Chisel or Saw Chain, and the tool and its enchantments remain. (Mending increases air consumption.) In combat use, the pneumatic pickaxe has stats similar to the axe, and the pneumatic axe has stats similar to the sword.
pickaxe and axe

**-Pneumatic Leggings**
These leggings are effectively an exoskeleton that increases your mobility. When powered up, it increases your speed, increases your jump height, and increases the maximum height from which you can safely fall.

**-Pneumatic Boots**
These boots allow you to fly like a jetpack, they aren't super fast but they allow you to fly with precision and stand in the air by holding down shift.
leggings and boots

**-Air Vent**
This block allows you to draw air into the pipes and then use the accumulated pressure. How much air you can draw in per second depends on how good access to air this vent has.

**-Air Dispenser**
This block is basically supposed to make it easier to fill your backtank. When it has air in it (it can also be something else, but I don't recommend it) It will fill your tank after standing on it. Its second use is to suddenly release the accumulated pressure, this can be done with the redstone signal. Such a sudden release of air will push away all mobs in the block's blast zone.

 

**What else does this mod not add but is planned?**

**-Air Dash** It's supposed to use the air from the backtank to push you in a specific direction.
-Air Dispenser should include backtank capacity enchantment
-Special enchantments designed specifically for pneumatic equipment
-Add allows enchanting of inactive tools
